securityLevel.description: The security level for the CIS scan. Security level refers to the Benchmark levels that CIS assigns to a profile.

scanConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the scan configuration.

ownerAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID that owns the scan configuration.

periodicScanFrequency.description: The frequency at which periodic scans are performed.

frequencyExpression.description: The schedule expression for periodic scans, in cron format.

ruleSetCategories.description: The categories of security rules applied during the scan.

scopeSettings.description: The scope settings that define which repositories will be scanned. If the ScopeSetting parameter is ALL the scan configuration applies to all existing and future projects imported into Amazon Inspector.

projectSelectionScope.description: The scope of projects to be selected for scanning within the integrated repositories. Setting the value to ALL applies the scope settings to all existing and future projects imported into Amazon Inspector.

tags.description: The tags associated with the scan configuration.

For subsequent calls, use the NextToken value returned from the previous request to continue listing results after the first page.

coveredResources.description: An object that contains details on the covered resources in your environment.

accountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the covered resource.

scanType.description: The Amazon Inspector scan type covering the resource.

scanStatus.description: The status of the scan covering the resource.

reason.description:
The scan status. Possible return values and descriptions are:

ACCESS_DENIED - Resource access policy restricting Amazon Inspector access. Please update the IAM policy.

ACCESS_DENIED_TO_ENCRYPTION_KEY - The KMS key policy doesn't allow Amazon Inspector access. Update the key policy.

DEEP_INSPECTION_COLLECTION_TIME_LIMIT_EXCEEDED - Amazon Inspector failed to extract the package inventory because the package collection time exceeding the maximum threshold of 15 minutes.

DEEP_INSPECTION_DAILY_SSM_INVENTORY_LIMIT_EXCEEDED - The SSM agent couldn't send inventory to Amazon Inspector because the SSM quota for Inventory data collected per instance per day has already been reached for this instance.

DEEP_INSPECTION_NO_INVENTORY - The Amazon Inspector plugin hasn't yet been able to collect an inventory of packages for this instance. This is usually the result of a pending scan, however, if this status persists after 6 hours, use SSM to ensure that the required Amazon Inspector associations exist and are running for the instance.

DEEP_INSPECTION_PACKAGE_COLLECTION_LIMIT_EXCEEDED - The instance has exceeded the 5000 package limit for Amazon Inspector Deep inspection. To resume Deep inspection for this instance you can try to adjust the custom paths associated with the account.

EC2_INSTANCE_STOPPED - This EC2 instance is in a stopped state, therefore, Amazon Inspector will pause scanning. The existing findings will continue to exist until the instance is terminated. Once the instance is re-started, Inspector will automatically start scanning the instance again. Please note that you will not be charged for this instance while it's in a stopped state.

EXCLUDED_BY_TAG - This resource was not scanned because it has been excluded by a tag.

IMAGE_SIZE_EXCEEDED - Reserved for future use.

INTEGRATION_CONNNECTION_LOST - Amazon Inspector couldn't communicate with the source code management platform.

INTERNAL_ERROR - Amazon Inspector has encountered an internal error for this resource. Amazon Inspector service will automatically resolve the issue and resume the scanning. No action required from the user.

NO_INVENTORY - Amazon Inspector couldn't find software application inventory to scan for vulnerabilities. This might be caused due to required Amazon Inspector associations being deleted or failing to run on your resource. Please verify the status of InspectorInventoryCollection-do-not-delete association in the SSM console for the resource. Additionally, you can verify the instance's inventory in the SSM Fleet Manager console.

NO_RESOURCES_FOUND - Reserved for future use.

NO_SCAN_CONFIGURATION_ASSOCIATED - The code repository resource doesn't have an associated scan configuration.

PENDING_DISABLE - This resource is pending cleanup during disablement. The customer will not be billed while a resource is in the pending disable status.

PENDING_INITIAL_SCAN - This resource has been identified for scanning, results will be available soon.

RESOURCE_TERMINATED - This resource has been terminated. The findings and coverage associated with this resource are in the process of being cleaned up.

SCAN_ELIGIBILITY_EXPIRED - The configured scan duration has lapsed for this image.

SCAN_FREQUENCY_MANUAL - This image will not be covered by Amazon Inspector due to the repository scan frequency configuration.

SCAN_FREQUENCY_SCAN_ON_PUSH - This image will be scanned one time and will not new findings because of the scan frequency configuration.

SCAN_IN_PROGRESS - The resource is currently being scanned.

STALE_INVENTORY - Amazon Inspector wasn't able to collect an updated software application inventory in the last 7 days. Please confirm the required Amazon Inspector associations still exist and you can still see an updated inventory in the SSM console.

SUCCESSFUL - The scan was successful.

UNMANAGED_EC2_INSTANCE - The EC2 instance is not managed by SSM, please use the following SSM automation to remediate the issue: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/systems-manager-automation-runbooks/latest/userguide/automation-awssupport-troubleshoot-managed-instance.html. Once the instance becomes managed by SSM, Inspector will automatically begin scanning this instance.

UNSUPPORTED_CONFIG_FILE - Reserved for future use.

UNSUPPORTED_LANGUAGE - The scan was unsuccessful because the repository contains files in an unsupported programming language.

UNSUPPORTED_MEDIA_TYPE - The ECR image has an unsupported media type.

UNSUPPORTED_OS - Amazon Inspector does not support this OS, architecture, or image manifest type at this time. To see a complete list of supported operating systems see: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/inspector/latest/user/supported.html.

UNSUPPORTED_RUNTIME - The function was not scanned because it has an unsupported runtime. To see a complete list of supported runtimes see: https://docs.aws.amazon.com/inspector/latest/user/supported.html.

IMAGE_ARCHIVED - This image has been archived in Amazon ECR and is no longer available for scanning in Amazon Inspector.

fixAvailable.description: Details on whether a fix is available through a version update. This value can be YES, NO, or PARTIAL. A PARTIAL fix means that some, but not all, of the packages identified in the finding have fixes available through updated versions.

exploitAvailable.description: Filters the list of Amazon Web Services Lambda findings by the availability of exploits.

codeVulnerabilityDetectorName.description: The name of the detector used to identify a code vulnerability in a Lambda function used to filter findings.

codeVulnerabilityDetectorTags.description: The detector type tag associated with the vulnerability used to filter findings. Detector tags group related vulnerabilities by common themes or tactics. For a list of available tags by programming language, see Java tags, or Python tags.

codeVulnerabilityFilePath.description: The file path to the file in a Lambda function that contains a code vulnerability used to filter findings.

epssScore.description: The EPSS score used to filter findings.

codeRepositoryProjectName.description: Filter criteria for findings based on the project name in a code repository.

codeRepositoryProviderType.description: Filter criteria for findings based on the repository provider type (such as GitHub, GitLab, etc.).

action.description: The action that is to be applied to the findings that match the filter.

createdAt.description: The date and time this filter was created at.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the filter was last updated at.

For subsequent calls, use the NextToken value returned from the previous request to continue listing results after the first page.

findings.description: Contains details on the findings in your environment.

findingArn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) of the finding.

awsAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID associated with the finding.

type.description: The type of the finding. The type value determines the valid values for resource in your request. For more information, see Finding types in the Amazon Inspector user guide.

remediation.description: An object that contains the details about how to remediate a finding.

recommendation.description: An object that contains information about the recommended course of action to remediate the finding.

text.description: The recommended course of action to remediate the finding.

Url.description: The URL address to the CVE remediation recommendations.

severity.description: The severity of the finding. UNTRIAGED applies to PACKAGE_VULNERABILITY type findings that the vendor has not assigned a severity yet. For more information, see Severity levels for findings in the Amazon Inspector user guide.

firstObservedAt.description: The date and time that the finding was first observed.

lastObservedAt.description: The date and time the finding was last observed. This timestamp for this field remains unchanged until a finding is updated.

updatedAt.description: The date and time the finding was last updated at.

status.description: The status of the finding.

resources.description: Contains information on the resources involved in a finding. The resource value determines the valid values for type in your request. For more information, see Finding types in the Amazon Inspector user guide.

inspectorScore.description: The Amazon Inspector score given to the finding.

inspectorScoreDetails.description: An object that contains details of the Amazon Inspector score.

adjustedCvss.description: An object that contains details about the CVSS score given to a finding.

adjustments.description: An object that contains details about adjustment Amazon Inspector made to the CVSS score.

networkReachabilityDetails.description: An object that contains the details of a network reachability finding.

openPortRange.description: An object that contains details about the open port range associated with a finding.

begin.description: The beginning port in a port range.

end.description: The ending port in a port range.

networkPath.description: An object that contains details about a network path associated with a finding.

steps.description: The details on the steps in the network path.

packageVulnerabilityDetails.description: An object that contains the details of a package vulnerability finding.

cvss.description: An object that contains details about the CVSS score of a finding.

relatedVulnerabilities.description: One or more vulnerabilities related to the one identified in this finding.

sourceUrl.description: A URL to the source of the vulnerability information.

vendorSeverity.description: The severity the vendor has given to this vulnerability type.

vendorCreatedAt.description: The date and time that this vulnerability was first added to the vendor's database.

vendorUpdatedAt.description: The date and time the vendor last updated this vulnerability in their database.

referenceUrls.description: One or more URLs that contain details about this vulnerability type.

fixAvailable.description: Details on whether a fix is available through a version update. This value can be YES, NO, or PARTIAL. A PARTIAL fix means that some, but not all, of the packages identified in the finding have fixes available through updated versions.

exploitAvailable.description: If a finding discovered in your environment has an exploit available.

exploitabilityDetails.description: The details of an exploit available for a finding discovered in your environment.

lastKnownExploitAt.description: The date and time of the last exploit associated with a finding discovered in your environment.

codeVulnerabilityDetails.description: Details about the code vulnerability identified in a Lambda function used to filter findings.

filePath.description: Contains information on where the code vulnerability is located in your code.

fileName.description: The name of the file the code vulnerability was found in.

filePath.description: The file path to the code that a vulnerability was found in.

startLine.description: The line number of the first line of code that a vulnerability was found in.

endLine.description: The line number of the last line of code that a vulnerability was found in.

detectorTags.description: The detector tag associated with the vulnerability. Detector tags group related vulnerabilities by common themes or tactics. For a list of available tags by programming language, see Java tags, or Python tags.

referenceUrls.description: A URL containing supporting documentation about the code vulnerability detected.

ruleId.description: The identifier for a rule that was used to detect the code vulnerability.

sourceLambdaLayerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Lambda layer that the code vulnerability was detected in.

detectorId.description: The ID for the Amazon CodeGuru detector associated with the finding. For more information on detectors see Amazon CodeGuru Detector Library.

detectorName.description: The name of the detector used to identify the code vulnerability. For more information on detectors see CodeGuru Detector Library.

cwes.description: The Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE) item associated with the detected vulnerability.

members.description: An object that contains details for each member account.

nextToken.description: The pagination parameter to be used on the next list operation to retrieve more items.

delegatedAdminAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the Amazon Inspector delegated administrator for this member account.

updatedAt.description: A timestamp showing when the status of this member was last updated.

usage.description: An object representing the total usage for an account.

successfulAssociations.description: Details of code repositories that were successfully disassociated from the scan configuration.

statusCode.description: The status code indicating why the association or disassociation failed.

tools.description: The known malware tools or kits that can exploit the vulnerability.

exploitObserved.description: Contains information on when this exploit was observed.

firstSeen.description: The date an time when the exploit was first seen.

referenceUrls.description: The reference URLs for the vulnerability data.

cwes.description: The Common Weakness Enumerations (CWEs) associated with the vulnerability.

epssScore.description: The Exploit Prediction Scoring System (EPSS) score of the vulnerability.

reportId.description: The report ID of the canceled SBOM export.

scanConfigurationArn.description: The scan configuration ARN for the CIS scan configuration.

integrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created code security integration.

status.description: The current status of the code security integration.

authorizationUrl.description: The URL used to authorize the integration with the repository provider.

scanConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the created scan configuration.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) of the successfully created filter.

integrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the deleted code security integration.

scanConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the deleted scan configuration.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) of the filter that has been deleted.

delegatedAdminAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the successfully disabled delegated administrator.

accountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the successfully disassociated member.

accounts.description: Information on the accounts that have had Amazon Inspector scans successfully enabled. Details are provided for each account.

failedAccounts.description: Information on any accounts for which Amazon Inspector scans could not be enabled. Details are provided for each account.

accountId.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account.

status.description: The status of Amazon Inspector for the account.

resourceStatus.description: Details of the status of Amazon Inspector scans by resource type.

ec2.description: The status of Amazon Inspector scanning for Amazon EC2 resources.

ecr.description: The status of Amazon Inspector scanning for Amazon ECR resources.

lambda.description: The status of Amazon Inspector scanning for Amazon Web Services Lambda function.

lambdaCode.description: The status of Amazon Inspector scanning for custom application code for Amazon Web Services Lambda functions.

codeRepository.description: The status of Amazon Inspector scanning for code repositories.

delegatedAdminAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the successfully Amazon Inspector delegated administrator.

url.description: The URL where a PDF or CSV of the CIS scan report can be downloaded.

status.description: The status.

nextToken.description: The pagination token from a previous request that's used to retrieve the next page of results.

scanArn.description: The CIS scan result details' scan ARN.

accountId.description: The CIS scan result details' account ID.

targetResourceId.description: The CIS scan result details' target resource ID.

status.description: The CIS scan result details' status.

statusReason.description: The CIS scan result details' status reason.

checkId.description: The CIS scan result details' check ID.

checkDescription.description: The account ID that's associated with the CIS scan result details.

findingArn.description: The CIS scan result details' finding ARN.

cluster.description: A unit of work inside of a cluster, which can include metadata about the cluster.

nextToken.description: The pagination token from a previous request used to retrieve the next page of results.

integrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the code security integration.

name.description: The name of the code security integration.

type.description: The type of repository provider for the integration.

status.description: The current status of the code security integration.

statusReason.description: The reason for the current status of the code security integration.

createdOn.description: The timestamp when the code security integration was created.

lastUpdateOn.description: The timestamp when the code security integration was last updated.

tags.description: The tags associated with the code security integration.

authorizationUrl.description: The URL used to authorize the integration with the repository provider. This is only returned if reauthorization is required to fix a connection issue. Otherwise, it is null.

resource.description: The resource identifier for the code repository that was scanned.

accountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID associated with the scan.

status.description: The current status of the scan.

statusReason.description: The reason for the current status of the scan.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the scan was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the scan was last updated.

lastCommitId.description: The identifier of the last commit that was scanned. This is only returned if the scan was successful or skipped.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the project in the code repository.

scanConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the scan configuration.

configuration.description: The configuration settings for the code security scan.

level.description: The security level for the scan configuration.

scopeSettings.description: The scope settings that define which repositories will be scanned. If the ScopeSetting parameter is ALL the scan configuration applies to all existing and future projects imported into Amazon Inspector.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the scan configuration was created.

lastUpdatedAt.description: The timestamp when the scan configuration was last updated.

tags.description: The tags associated with the scan configuration.

periodicScanConfiguration.description: Configuration settings for periodic scans that run on a scheduled basis.

frequency.description:
The frequency at which periodic scans are performed (such as weekly or monthly).

If you don't provide the frequencyExpression Amazon Inspector chooses day for the scan to run. If you provide the frequencyExpression, the schedule must match the specified frequency.

frequencyExpression.description: The schedule expression for periodic scans, in cron format.

continuousIntegrationScanConfiguration.description: Configuration settings for continuous integration scans that run automatically when code changes are made.

supportedEvents.description: The repository events that trigger continuous integration scans, such as pull requests or commits.

ruleSetCategories.description: The categories of security rules to be applied during the scan.

accountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the member account.

delegatedAdminAccountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID of the Amazon Inspector delegated administrator for this member account.

updatedAt.description: A timestamp showing when the status of this member was last updated.

reportId.description: The report ID of the software bill of materials (SBOM) report.

format.description: The format of the software bill of materials (SBOM) report.

status.description: The status of the software bill of materials (SBOM) report.

s3Destination.description: Contains details of the Amazon S3 bucket and KMS key used to export findings

filterCriteria.description: Contains details about the resource filter criteria used for the software bill of materials (SBOM) report.

bucketName.description: The name of the Amazon S3 bucket to export findings to.

keyPrefix.description: The prefix that the findings will be written under.

kmsKeyArn.description: The ARN of the KMS key used to encrypt data when exporting findings.

nextToken.description: The pagination token from a previous request that's used to retrieve the next page of results.

scanArn.description: The scan ARN for the CIS check scan ARN.

checkId.description: The check ID for the CIS check.

accountId.description: The account ID for the CIS check.

skipped.description: The number of checks that were skipped.

nextToken.description: The pagination token from a previous request that's used to retrieve the next page of results.

scanArn.description: The scan ARN for the CIS target resource.

accountId.description: The account ID for the CIS target resource.

skipped.description: The number of checks that were skipped.

platform.description: The platform for the CIS target resource.

associations.description: A list of associations between code repositories and scan configurations.

nextToken.description: A token to use for paginating results that are returned in the response. Set the value of this parameter to null for the first request to a list action. For subsequent calls, use the NextToken value returned from the previous request to continue listing results after the first page.

resource.description: Identifies a specific resource in a code repository that will be scanned.

projectId.description: The unique identifier of the project in the code repository.

responses.description: Objects that contain the results of an aggregation operation.

nextToken.description: A token to use for paginating results that are returned in the response. Set the value of this parameter to null for the first request to a list action. For subsequent calls, use the NextToken value returned from the previous request to continue listing results after the first page.

accountAggregation.description: An object that contains details about an aggregation response based on Amazon Web Services account IDs.

accountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID.

all.description: The total count of findings from all severities.

medium.description: The total count of medium severity findings.

high.description: The total count of high severity findings.

critical.description: The total count of critical severity findings.

exploitAvailableCount.description: The number of findings that have an exploit available.

fixAvailableCount.description: Details about the number of fixes.

amiAggregation.description: An object that contains details about an aggregation response based on Amazon Machine Images (AMIs).

ami.description: The ID of the AMI that findings were aggregated for.

accountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID for the AMI.

severityCounts.description: An object that contains the count of matched findings per severity.

all.description: The total count of findings from all severities.

medium.description: The total count of medium severity findings.

high.description: The total count of high severity findings.

critical.description: The total count of critical severity findings.

affectedInstances.description: The IDs of Amazon EC2 instances using this AMI.

imageSha.description: The SHA value of the container image.

medium.description: The total count of medium severity findings.

high.description: The total count of high severity findings.

critical.description: The total count of critical severity findings.

inUseCount.description: The number of Amazon ECS tasks or Amazon EKS pods where the Amazon ECR container image is in use.

medium.description: The total count of medium severity findings.

high.description: The total count of high severity findings.

medium.description: The total count of medium severity findings.

high.description: The total count of high severity findings.

critical.description: The total count of critical severity findings.

severityCounts.description: An object that represent the count of matched findings per severity.

functionName.description: The names of the Amazon Web Services Lambda functions associated with the layers.

layerArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon Web Services Lambda function layer.

all.description: The total count of findings from all severities.

medium.description: The total count of medium severity findings.

high.description: The total count of high severity findings.

critical.description: The total count of critical severity findings.

resourceId.description: The resource IDs included in the aggregation results.

functionName.description: The Amazon Web Services Lambda function names included in the aggregation results.

runtime.description: The runtimes included in the aggregation results.

lambdaTags.description: The tags included in the aggregation results.

accountId.description: The ID of the Amazon Web Services account that owns the Amazon Web Services Lambda function.

severityCounts.description: An object that contains the counts of aggregated finding per severity.

all.description: The total count of findings from all severities.

medium.description: The total count of medium severity findings.

high.description: The total count of high severity findings.

critical.description: The total count of critical severity findings.

lastModifiedAt.description: The date that the Amazon Web Services Lambda function included in the aggregation results was last changed.

codeRepositoryAggregation.description: An object that contains details about an aggregation response based on code repositories.

projectNames.description: The names of the projects associated with the code repository.

providerType.description: The type of repository provider for the code repository.

severityCounts.description: An object that contains the counts of aggregated finding per severity.

all.description: The total count of findings from all severities.

medium.description: The total count of medium severity findings.

high.description: The total count of high severity findings.

critical.description: The total count of critical severity findings.

exploitAvailableActiveFindingsCount.description: The number of active findings that have an exploit available for the code repository.

fixAvailableActiveFindingsCount.description: The number of active findings that have a fix available for the code repository.

accountId.description: The Amazon Web Services account ID associated with the code repository.

resourceId.description: The resource ID of the code repository.

nextToken.description: The pagination parameter to be used on the next list operation to retrieve more items.

cwes.description: The Common Weakness Enumeration (CWE) associated with the vulnerability.

cisaData.description: An object that contains the Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) details for the vulnerability.

dateAdded.description: The date and time CISA added this vulnerability to their catalogue.

dateDue.description: The date and time CISA expects a fix to have been provided vulnerability.

action.description: The remediation action recommended by CISA for this vulnerability.

source.description: The source of the vulnerability information. Possible results are RHEL, AMAZON_CVE, DEBIAN or NVD.

atigData.description: An object that contains information about the Amazon Web Services Threat Intel Group (ATIG) details for the vulnerability.

firstSeen.description: The date and time this vulnerability was first observed.

lastSeen.description: The date and time this vulnerability was last observed.

ttps.description: The MITRE ATT&CK tactics, techniques, and procedures (TTPs) associated with vulnerability.

cvss4.description: An object that contains the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) Version 4 details for the vulnerability.

baseScore.description: The base CVSS v4 score for the vulnerability finding, which rates the severity of the vulnerability on a scale from 0 to 10.

scoringVector.description: The CVSS v4 scoring vector, which contains the metrics and measurements that were used to calculate the base score.

cvss3.description: An object that contains the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) Version 3 details for the vulnerability.

baseScore.description: The CVSS v3 base score for the vulnerability.

scoringVector.description: The scoring vector associated with the CVSS v3 score.

cvss2.description: An object that contains the Common Vulnerability Scoring System (CVSS) Version 2 details for the vulnerability.

baseScore.description: The CVSS v2 base score for the vulnerability.

scoringVector.description: The scoring vector associated with the CVSS v2 score.

vendorCreatedAt.description: The date and time when the vendor created this vulnerability.

vendorUpdatedAt.description: The date and time when the vendor last updated this vulnerability.

sourceUrl.description: A link to the official source material for this vulnerability.

referenceUrls.description: Links to various resources with more information on this vulnerability.

exploitObserved.description: An object that contains details on when the exploit was observed.

lastSeen.description: The date an time when the exploit was last seen.

firstSeen.description: The date an time when the exploit was first seen.

detectionPlatforms.description: Platforms that the vulnerability can be detected on.

epss.description: An object that contains the Exploit Prediction Scoring System (EPSS) score for a vulnerability.

scanId.description: The unique identifier of the initiated scan.

status.description: The current status of the initiated scan.

integrationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the updated code security integration.

status.description: The current status of the updated code security integration.

scanConfigurationArn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the updated scan configuration.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Number (ARN) of the successfully updated filter.

autoEnable.description: The updated status of scan types automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.

ec2.description: Represents whether Amazon EC2 scans are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.

ecr.description: Represents whether Amazon ECR scans are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.

lambda.description: Represents whether Amazon Web Services Lambda standard scans are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.

lambdaCode.description: Represents whether Lambda code scans are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.

codeRepository.description: Represents whether code repository scans are automatically enabled for new members of your Amazon Inspector organization.
